reviews.comment:
El pasto estaba cortadito así que aproveché para tirarme boca arriba a contemplar ese cielo alucinante.

(Translated by Google)
The grass was freshly cut, so I took the opportunity to lie on my back and contemplate that amazing sky.

reviews.comment:
Malísimo... no tenían cafetería, pocos productos en la tienda, no andaba el sistema para la tarjeta de serviclub y tampoco la app de ypf.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible... they didn't have a cafeteria, there were few products in the store, the Serviclub card system didn't work, and neither did the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación

(Translated by Google)
Very nice station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMWFYSV93RRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es agradable pero hay muy pocos playeros. El que me tenía que atender se fue al baño y no volvió por alrededor de 15 minutos y nadie lo reemplazó.. La fila de ese surtidor se extendió por casi 1 cuadra de largo. Hay que tener much paciencia en ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, but there are very few beachgoers. The person who was supposed to help me went to the bathroom and didn't come back for about 15 minutes, and no one replaced him. The line at that pump stretched for almost a block. You have to be very patient there.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su opinión Sergio tendremos en cuenta su comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbGRlc2h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención.
Para ser una estación que se encuentra como el primer lugar de YPF a la salida de la ruta del desierto... es vergonzoso que no se pueda abonar con la aplicación o tener que rogar para que se nos cobre con débito...
Un solo playero con una cola de más de 20 autos...
Todas en contra... una pena...

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service.
For a station that's the first YPF location off the desert highway... it's shameful that you can't pay with the app or have to beg to be charged by debit card...
Just one parking attendant with a line of more than 20 cars...
All against it... a shame...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcGRYZjNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un solo playero por isla, pobres pibes no dan a basto y se arma una cola de autos larguísima. Para peor, no aceptan pagos con QR ni de Mercado Pago ni de la App YPF. Si no estás muy jugado con la nafta y vas al sur, seguir hasta le YPF de Catriel. Si vas al norte, hacer 4kms más y parar en la Axion.

(Translated by Google)
There's only one attendant per island, the poor guys are overwhelmed, and a huge line of cars forms. To make matters worse, they don't accept QR code payments from Mercado Pago or the YPF app. If you're not worried about fuel and you're heading south, continue to the YPF in Catriel. If you're going north, drive another 4 km and stop at the Axion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdWRta2VREAE
